errors.api-key-required: Enter both client id and client secret
errors.field-empty: That field is empty for this item
errors.login-failed: Could not log in to Bitwarden CLI
errors.logout-failed: Could not log out of Bitwarden CLI

launcher.generate-hint: Copy a new password (settings control length/charset)
launcher.lock-hint: Lock the local bw serve session
launcher.login-hint: Log in with your personal API key
launcher.logout-hint: Stop serve and log out of the Bitwarden CLI
launcher.not-logged-in: Not logged in to Bitwarden CLI
launcher.serve-down-hint: Start the local API, then unlock
launcher.sync-hint: Pull latest vault data from the server

logged-in: Logged in, unlock with your master password

panel.login-blurb: From the web vault: Settings → Security → Keys → View API key. You can also run bw login once in a terminal instead.

auto_serve.description: Start bw serve on 127.0.0.1 when it is not already reachable
auto_serve.label: Auto-Start Serve

clear_clipboard_seconds.description: Clear the clipboard after this many seconds if it still holds the copied value. 0 disables clearing
clear_clipboard_seconds.label: Clear Clipboard (Seconds)

copy_field.description: Which field to copy when activating a launcher result
copy_field.label: Copy Field

gen_lowercase.description: Include lowercase letters in generated passwords
gen_lowercase.label: Include Lowercase

gen_passphrase_capitalize.description: Capitalize each word in generated passphrases
gen_passphrase_capitalize.label: Capitalize Passphrase Words

gen_passphrase_include_number.description: Append a number to generated passphrases
gen_passphrase_include_number.label: Include Number In Passphrase

gen_passphrase_separator.description: Separator between passphrase words (e.g. - or space)
gen_passphrase_separator.label: Passphrase Separator

gen_passphrase_words.description: Number of words in generated passphrases
gen_passphrase_words.label: Passphrase Words

gen_special.description: Include special characters in generated passwords
gen_special.label: Include Special Characters

gen_uppercase.description: Include uppercase letters in generated passwords
gen_uppercase.label: Include Uppercase

notify_on_copy.description: Show a notification after copying a vault field or generated secret
notify_on_copy.label: Notify On Copy

serve_port.description: Local port for bw serve (bound to 127.0.0.1 only)
serve_port.label: Serve Port

server_url.description: Bitwarden server URL for login (empty = default US cloud). Example: https://vault.bitwarden.eu
server_url.label: Server URL

vault_timeout.description: Auto-lock the local bw serve vault after inactivity, when Noctalia restarts, or never (stays unlocked until you lock/logout or serve stops, e.g. reboot)
vault_timeout.label: Vault Timeout

vault_timeout_custom_minutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before auto-lock when Vault Timeout is Custom
vault_timeout_custom_minutes.label: Custom Timeout (Minutes)

title: Bitwarden
